title: pterisanthes rufula
intro: Pterisanthes rufula is a species of plant in the family Vitaceae, commonly known as the Rufula grapevine or Chinese grapevine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pterisanthes rufula include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems.
